name: Круг Крови
description: The Circle of Blood is a keeper of the old ways. They remember how ancient Druids performed sacrificial rituals under a blood-red moon to appease the uncaring forces of nature. These Druids trade blood for life in a delicate balance to bolster their allies and destroy their enemies.

features.name: Circle of Blood Spells
features.description: When you reach a Druid level specified in the Circle of Blood Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

features.name: Rite of the Blood Moon
features.description: As a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, you can expend a use of your Wild Shape to adopt the violent savagery of the Blood Moon for 10 minutes. During this time, you gain the following benefits: {@b Red Resilience.} You gain {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to three times your Druid level. {@b Speed Increased.} Your {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} increases by 10 feet, and you can take the {@action Dash|XPHB} action as a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}. {@b Violent Strikes.} When you hit a creature with a weapon or {@action Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, you can deal an extra {@dice 1d6} Necrotic damage to the target.

features.name: Sanguine Rites
features.description: Your blood magic deepens, allowing you to perform dark rituals that empower your allies or weaken your enemies. When you cast a spell that restores hit points while your Rite of the Blood Moon is active, you can add your Wisdom modifier to the healing done. Additionally, you gain resistance to Necrotic damage.

features.name: Crimson Harvest
features.description: When you deal Necrotic damage with your Violent Strikes feature or a Druid spell while your Rite of the Blood Moon is active, you regain hit points equal to half the Necrotic damage dealt. This healing can't exceed your Wisdom modifier per turn (minimum of 1).

features.name: Avatar of the Blood Moon
features.description: Your mastery of blood magic reaches its apex. While your Rite of the Blood Moon is active, the Necrotic damage from your Violent Strikes increases to {@dice 2d6}. Additionally, when a creature within 30 feet of you is reduced to 0 hit points, you can use your reaction to draw the creature's life force to yourself or an ally within 30 feet, granting {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to your Druid level.
